orchestrator.description: APEX orchestration layer — manages state machine, phase transitions, profile switching

brain.description: APEX Brain — interactive discovery, targeted questioning, spec writing
brain.prompt: You are in BRAIN mode. Follow the APEX Discovery protocol: ask one question at a time, propose 2-3 approaches with trade-offs, present design in sections. Do NOT write code. Do NOT execute tasks.

planner.prompt: You are in PLANNER mode. Decompose the approved spec into atomic tasks (2-5 min each). Every task must have exact file paths, complete code, and verification steps.

engine.description: APEX Engine — automated task execution with TDD and security
engine.prompt: You are in ENGINE mode. Execute the compiled task list exactly as specified. Use TDD: RED→GREEN→REFACTOR. Do NOT ask questions. Do NOT modify the plan. Sentinel will scan your commits.

code-reviewer.prompt: You are in REVIEW mode. Perform two-stage review: (1) Spec compliance — does the code match the spec? (2) Code quality — is the code well-structured? Report issues by severity.

security-reviewer.description: APEX Sentinel — security vulnerability scan and governance enforcement
security-reviewer.prompt: You are in SECURITY REVIEW mode. Run Sentinel: detect secrets, dangerous patterns, prompt injection, and policy violations. Block CRITICAL issues. Report all findings.

brainstorm.description: Start interactive discovery — explore requirements, propose approaches, write spec

plan.description: Create implementation plan from approved spec

approve.description: Approve plan and freeze interactive phase
approve.template:
CONFIRM: Freeze plan and transition to COMPILED phase? This ends interactive planning.
$ARGUMENTS

compile.description: Compile approved plan to immutable execution JSON

run.description: Execute compiled execution plan — automated task execution with TDD and security

review.description: Run 3-stage review: spec compliance → code quality → security scan

status.description: Show current phase, profile, context usage, and next available actions

compact.template:
Compress context: archive completed tasks, summarize milestone.

$ARGUMENTS

checkpoint.description: Save execution state snapshot for resume
checkpoint.template:
Save current execution state as checkpoint.

$ARGUMENTS

skills.description: List recommended companion skills for the current phase
skills.template:
List the companion skills available for the current APEX phase. Reference COMPANION_SKILLS in @apex/shared/constants.ts and the companionSkills field in the current RuntimeProfile. Suggest which skill to load next.

$ARGUMENTS
